summary_en: Trump announces 25% steel tariff and 10% aluminum tariff on all imports, says trade wars are 'good and easy to win'
summary_zh: 特朗普宣布对所有进口钢铁征25%关税、铝征10%关税，称贸易战好打且容易赢

summary_en: Trump signs memo imposing tariffs on up to $60 billion in Chinese goods, targeting tech and aerospace sectors
summary_zh: 特朗普签备忘录对最多600亿美元中国商品加关税，重点针对科技和航空航天

summary_en: Trump threatens additional $100 billion in tariffs on China after Beijing's retaliation, warns of further escalation
summary_zh: 中国反制后，特朗普威胁再追加1000亿美元关税，警告将进一步升级

summary_en: Mnuchin says US-China trade war 'on hold' after Beijing agrees to buy more US goods; Trump confirms ceasefire
summary_zh: 中方同意购买更多美国商品后，姆努钦宣布贸易战暂停，特朗普确认停火

summary_en: Trump tweets he will raise tariffs on $200B of Chinese goods from 10% to 25% on Friday, trade talks collapsing
summary_zh: 特朗普发推称周五起将2000亿中国商品关税从10%提至25%，谈判濒临破裂

summary_en: After G20 meeting, Trump agrees to restart trade talks with Xi, no new tariffs, allows Huawei purchases to resume
summary_zh: G20后特朗普同意与习重启谈判，不加新关税，允许恢复对华为采购

summary_en: Trump announces 10% tariff on remaining $300B Chinese goods starting September 1, no exceptions
summary_zh: 特朗普宣布9月1日起对剩余3000亿美元中国商品加征10%关税，无例外

summary_en: Trump says he has second thoughts about trade war; White House clarifies he regrets not raising tariffs even higher
summary_zh: 特朗普称对贸易战有些后悔，白宫随后澄清他后悔的是没把关税加得更高

summary_en: Trump announces Phase 1 trade deal with China, agrees to halve tariffs from 15% to 7.5% on $120B goods
summary_zh: 特朗普宣布与中国达成第一阶段贸易协议，同意将1200亿商品关税从15%降至7.5%

summary_en: Trump threatens to ban TikTok within 45 days unless sold to a US company, invokes national security emergency powers
summary_zh: 特朗普威胁45天内封禁TikTok除非出售给美国公司，援引国家安全紧急权力

summary_en: Trump signs executive order to impose 25% tariff on Canada and Mexico starting February 1, no negotiations
summary_zh: 特朗普签行政令宣布2月1日起对加拿大和墨西哥加征25%关税，不谈判

summary_en: After calls with Trudeau and Sheinbaum, Trump pauses Canada and Mexico tariffs for 30 days to allow negotiations
summary_zh: 与特鲁多和谢因鲍姆通话后，特朗普将加墨关税暂停30天以启动谈判

summary_en: Trump announces 25% tariff on all steel and aluminum imports globally, says exemptions considered case by case
summary_zh: 特朗普宣布对全球所有进口钢铁和铝征收25%关税，称豁免将逐案审查

summary_en: Trump activates full 25% tariff on Canada and Mexico; additional 10% tariff on Chinese goods takes effect simultaneously
summary_zh: 特朗普正式激活对加墨25%全额关税，同时对中国商品额外加征10%关税同步生效

summary_en: Trump exempts USMCA-compliant goods from Canada and Mexico tariffs just 2 days after activation, markets rally
summary_zh: 关税生效仅2天，特朗普豁免符合USMCA的加墨商品，市场随即反弹

summary_en: Trump announces Liberation Day: sweeping reciprocal tariffs on 185 countries, minimum 10%, China 34%, EU 20%
summary_zh: 特朗普宣布解放日：对185国征对等关税，最低10%，中国34%，欧盟20%

summary_en: Trump announces 90-day pause on reciprocal tariffs for all countries except China; China tariffs raised to 125%
summary_zh: 特朗普宣布对除中国外所有国家暂停对等关税90天，同时将中国关税提至125%

summary_en: Trump exempts smartphones, computers and semiconductors from China tariffs, says electronics need special treatment
summary_zh: 特朗普豁免智能手机、电脑和半导体的对华关税，称电子产品需要特殊对待

summary_en: Trump says will not fire Fed Chair Powell despite calling him a major loser, says rates should be cut immediately
summary_zh: 特朗普称不会解雇美联储主席鲍威尔，尽管骂他是大输家，但坚持应立即降息

summary_en: Trump signals willingness to reduce China tariffs significantly if deal reached, says 145% rate will come down substantially
summary_zh: 特朗普暗示若达成协议愿大幅降低对华关税，称145%税率会大幅下降
